manager.bio: The 2023 champion who entered the playoffs as the 6th seed and went on a run. Holds the all-time single-week scoring record (245.80 pts, Week 16 2021). The most explosive offense in the league — capable of beating anyone on any given week.

trades.note: Bought Burrow the season he went supernova. The QB foundation that's never wavered.
Shipped aging Diggs for devy Achane. Perfect timing — Achane became an elite RB.
Used the picks to move up for Nabers in the startup. Instant WR1 upgrade.
Traded Waddle for the elite TE. Fills the last positional void heading into 2025.

rivalries.description: The 2023 championship. JuicyBussy def. Eldridm20 in the title game to cap the 6th-seed run.
JuicyBussy's kryptonite. Despite the highest point ceiling in the league, MLSchools12 consistently finds a way.
The explosion vs commissioner battle. Always one of the most entertaining matchups on the schedule.
